---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Void OS
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🛑 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 💻 System Information
- **OS Version (Standard Windows build):** [e.g. 22621.1702]
- **Void OS Version:** [e.g. v1.0.0]
- **Hardware (CPU/GPU/RAM):** [e.g. Ryzen 7 5800X, RTX 3080, 32GB]
- **Is this a Laptop or Desktop?** [e.g. Laptop]

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run playbook '...'
2. Boot into OS
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your problem.

## ⚠️ Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., did you use any third-party tweakers alongside Void OS?).
